title: stelis gigas
intro: Stelis gigas, also known as the giant stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This epiphytic orchid is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stelis gigas include alleviating coughs and congestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
